allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: QR Fidélité app

Features:
- Participant flow with card flip animation
- Admin dashboard with stats and voucher management
- Supabase authentication \(email + Google OAuth\)
- Mailgun email integration
- SEO optimization \(sitemap, robots, meta tags\)
- Legal pages \(mentions légales, CGV, confidentialité\)
- Pricing page with 3 tiers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(powershell -Command "$apiKey = ''a696dae8dba1b29254d8fdfbbe7cadd4-1c7f8751-3b0782b0''; $domain = ''sandboxa4174323d84043ab80b3f46713d7e5fa.mailgun.org''; $auth = [Convert]::ToBase64String\([Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetBytes\(""api:$apiKey""\)\); $body = @{from = ""QR Fidelite <postmaster@$domain>""; to = ''hugolepoole@gmail.com''; subject = ''Test QR Fidelite''; text = ''Felicitations! Vous avez gagne -20%. Code: TEST1234''}; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri ""https://api.mailgun.net/v3/$domain/messages"" -Method Post -Headers @{Authorization = ""Basic $auth""} -Body $body")
